_comment: pisky-agent configuration — edit these values before starting

api._note: Public PISKY API. Self-hosters: change to http://localhost:18700 and set PISKY_INTERNAL_KEY in .env to bypass payment.

pisky._note: Agent will warn when PISKY balance drops below this (for API payment top-up)

llm._note: provider: 'openrouter' (cloud) or 'ollama' (local). baseUrl overrides provider default. openrouterKey or OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var.

survival._note: Warn when SOL < minSolWarning. Pause new buys when SOL < minSolPause. piskyReinvestPct: fraction of each profit used to buy PISKY (0.25 = 25%).

reflect._note: Self-improvement loop interval (default 4h). autoApply: true = auto-apply suggested config changes within safe bounds.

telegram._note: Set token here OR in TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var. heartbeatChatId = your Telegram user ID to receive heartbeat messages.

heartbeat._note: How often to run a proactive check-in (default 5 min). Set to 0 to disable.

swarm._note: autoPublish: emit buy/sell signals automatically on trade execution. minReputationToFollow: only factor signals from agents above this reputation score (0-100). consensusBoostFactor: multiply scan score by this when swarm consensus agrees (e.g. 1.2 = +20% score boost).
